channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran names successor to security chief killed in US-Israeli attack
item.description: Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr, ex-IRGC commander, to replace late Ali Larijani as chief of Supreme National Security Council.

item.title: Israeli strike lands near Roman ruins in Lebanon
item.description: Smoke was seen rising close to Roman ruins in the Lebanese city of Tyre after an Israeli strike hit a building nearby.

item.title: Kim Jong Un says North Korea will never give up on nuclear weapons
item.description: Kim Jong Un has said North Korea will never give up on its push for nuclear weapons.

item.title: Israeli defences questioned as Iran continues to cause damage
item.description: Iranian missiles have caused damage in Israel, raising questions about the country’s air defence systems.

item.title: Iranian IRGC’s ties to Hezbollah deepen tensions in Lebanese politics
item.description: Lebanon's prime minister said the IRGC is commanding Hezbollah and analysts agree the Iranian group is calling the shots

item.title: Israeli strike hits Tyre during Al Jazeera report
item.description: An Al Jazeera journalist's report was disrupted by an Israeli missile striking a waterfront building in Lebanon’s Tyre.

item.title: Moment rescuers find man alive under the rubble in Tehran
item.description: Rescuers have pulled a man alive from the rubble after US-Israeli strikes hit a residential area in Tehran.

item.title: Keir Starmer’s policy on the Iran war is a recipe for catastrophe
item.description: The British government has learned no lessons from the disaster that the US-UK invasion of Iraq was.

item.title: QatarEnergy declares force majeure on some LNG contracts due to Iran war
item.description: The move comes amid production disruptions linked to the US-Israeli war on Iran, which have affected Qatar.

item.title: Is the US talking to Iran’s Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, and who is he?
item.description: Iranian leaders, including Ghalibaf, have denied that talks with the US are under way.
